items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to decide whether the output is a finished volunteer_recruitment_image, not a worksheet, raw JSON dump, source-data screenshot, or generic mockup.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the artifact reads as a polished recruitment image. Partial credit for a styled but weak recruitment graphic. No credit for raw data, notes, or a non-image answer. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation to determine whether the image filters the shift data, ranks eligible opportunities, and features only the final selected Sunday opportunities.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the final opportunity set is clear. Partial credit when selection is ambiguous. No credit when the source JSON is copied without selection. Task completion should drop clearly when required env-grounded content is largely missing, even if the image is visually polished. Placeholder language such as coming soon, unavailable, pending, details will be available, cannot finalize, or not accessible does not count as completion.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that exactly these opportunities are featured: Garden Guide, Compost Demo, and Welcome Desk. Shift IDs are optional and should not be required.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for exactly the correct opportunity set. Partial credit only for minor readability ambiguity. No credit if any opportunity is replaced or an extra shift is featured.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify the visible order is Garden Guide first, Compost Demo second, and Welcome Desk third. Accept numbered cards, left-to-right, top-to-bottom, or another clear ranking cue.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when ranking is clear and correct. Partial credit when the set is correct but rank is partly ambiguous. No credit when order is wrong or absent.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify each featured opportunity displays the correct name, start time, and capacity: Garden Guide 10:00 4 open spots; Compost Demo 11:30 2 open spots; Welcome Desk 09:00 3 open spots. Accept equivalent AM/PM time and capacity wording.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when all names, times, and capacities are correctly paired. Partial credit for one minor formatting/readability issue. No credit for wrong values or values attached to wrong opportunities.

items.check: Semantic judge must verify that unselected shifts are not promoted as featured opportunities, including wrong-day, wrong-window, internal-audience, untrained, full, non-open, threshold-equal, and below-top-N shifts.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when no unselected shift is featured. Partial credit for a faint ambiguous mention. No credit when any unselected shift is clearly promoted.

items.check: Accept different recruitment layouts, including opportunity cards, ranked slots, banner sections, time badges, or capacity tags, as long as selected opportunities and values are easy to scan.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for clear hierarchy and scanability. Partial credit for cluttered but understandable layout. No credit when selected opportunities are buried. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Do not require shift IDs, full assignment rules, priority values, training flags, event windows, or filtering process steps. Treat them only as supporting context if present and correct.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the image focuses on selected opportunities. Partial credit if extra metadata appears but does not dominate. No credit if process details overwhelm the recruitment image. Structuring credit requires mostly correct core env facts; placeholder or generic content should score low even with a tidy layout.

items.check: Use semantic VLM/judge evaluation for readable typography, clear hierarchy, sufficient contrast, polished recruitment styling, and non-crowded spacing.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for readable polished design. Partial credit for minor clutter or weak styling. No credit for unreadable or visually incoherent output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

items.check: The recruitment image should have balanced density, clear opportunity/value pairing, platform-safe margins, and no placeholder-like empty regions.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit for balanced density and clear sections. Partial credit for weak spacing. No credit for blank, placeholder-like, or low-resolution output. Score only visual clarity, hierarchy, readability, composition, polish, and platform fit here; do not use this visual item to compensate for missing/incorrect env facts or to penalize forbidden facts.

score_caps.reason: A non-selected shift appears without a clear exclusion/not-selected context, indicating it may be promoted as a featured volunteer opportunity.

allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not an opportunity|not promoted|ineligible|unavailable)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Morning Check-in|Kids Crafts|Evening Cleanup|Seed Swap Helper|Water Station|Archived Booth Setup|Test Greeter Slot|Cancelled Plant Haul|Private Donor Tour|Old Fair Info Desk|Low Priority Flyer Table|Draft Mulch Crew|Monday Tear-down)\b

\b(Morning Check-in|Kids Crafts|Evening Cleanup|Seed Swap Helper|Water Station|Archived Booth Setup|Test Greeter Slot|Cancelled Plant Haul|Private Donor Tour|Old Fair Info Desk|Low Priority Flyer Table|Draft Mulch Crew|Monday Tear-down)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|not an opportunity|not promoted|ineligible|unavailable)\b

score_caps.reason: One or more required selected opportunities is missing.
The output appears to show the unfiltered shift catalog without a clear exclusion/not-selected context.
The final artifact is raw JSON, a worksheet, or a data dump instead of a polished recruitment image.
